dashboard.title: Instructor Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: How learners are doing across your courses, plus what's waiting for your review.
dashboard.emptyDesc: Build your first course or tutorial to see learner activity here.

myCourses.title: My Courses
myCourses.subtitle: Everything you've built on this device — drafts and published.
myCourses.emptyDesc: Create your first course or tutorial with the composer.

courseLearners.emptyTitle: No sign-ups yet on this device
courseLearners.emptyDesc: Each learner's progress lives on their own device — this view shows what the app has found here (sign-ups and in-class submissions).

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.subtitle: Learner submissions waiting for your review, plus pending classroom join requests.
inbox.emptyDesc: Nothing is waiting for your review.

submissionReview.title: Review submission
submissionReview.notFoundDesc: It may have been reviewed already or removed.
submissionReview.feedbackPlaceholder: What was strong, what to improve…

compose.courseIntro: A course is organized into chapters, each holding videos, lessons, quizzes, assessments, and hands-on exercises.
compose.tutorialIntro: A tutorial is a short single-track lesson — usually one video with markers and an optional quiz.
compose.blockerUnboundPlugins: none | {count} plugin element still needs a plugin chosen | {count} plugin elements still need a plugin chosen
compose.publishedNote: Learners can find and enroll in it now.
compose.nothingSelectedDesc: Pick an element from the outline, or add one to start building.
compose.confirmPublishMessage: This publishes '{title}' so learners can find and enroll right away. It's signed by you and shared directly with your connections.
compose.confirmDeleteMessage: This permanently deletes the draft and all its chapters and elements. This can't be undone.
compose.notFoundDesc: This course or tutorial doesn't exist on this device.

elementEditor.confirmDeleteMessage: This removes the element and its content from the course. This can't be undone.

video.markersHint: Timestamps become clickable navigation below the video.

quiz.empty: No questions yet — add the first one.
quiz.errTooFewOptions: Question {number} needs at least two options.
quiz.errNoCorrect: Question {number} has no correct answers marked.

text.heading: Lesson body (Markdown)
text.placeholder:
# Lesson title

Write the lesson in Markdown…

essay.heading: Essay assignment
essay.promptPlaceholder: What should the learner write about?
essay.rubricLabel: Grading rubric (shown to you when reviewing, and to the learner up front)
essay.hint: Essay submissions land in your instructor inbox for manual review and scoring.

plugin.heading: Plugin binding
plugin.noneInstalled: No enabled plugins installed — add one under Settings → Plugins.
plugin.configLabel: Element config (JSON passed to the plugin at init — e.g. a codejudge problem definition)
plugin.errFixConfig: Fix the config JSON before saving.
